description: CompiledRegistryEntry describes a single kind in a CompiledRegistry.

name.description: Name of the kind (matches the map key and CompiledKind.name).

path.description: Relative path to the compiled kind.json (e.g. "./worker/kind.json").

schema.description:
Relative path to the kind's composite resource schema
 (e.g. "./worker/kind.schema.json").

title: Compiled Registry Entry
